observations.archetype_gloss: The integrated center of personality, master of the dream realm
observations.summary: Dan asserts control over his dream environment, stepping onto the impossible surface and deciding how things work, indicating an expansion of his conscious self and mastery over his inner world.

evidence.quote: He stood on a shore of glittering black sand, the water before him unnaturally calm—a sheet of polished glass. A small boat sat at the water's edge; he dismissed it with a thought. He stepped out onto the surface, savoring the impossible ease of it. This was his dream, and he decided how things worked here.
